Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Charles J. Wisch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Hideko Shiroyama
Douglas J. Melton, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Foley & Lardner, LLP

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. Plaintiff Hideko Shiroyama's motion to compel responses to deposition questions and further responses to requests for admissions and production of documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to deposition questions #1 - 4. The motion is denied as to the requests for admissions and the request for production of documents.
Deposition to resume and be completed by October 9, 2008. Defendant to respond to form interrogatory 17.1 withing 7 days. As to request for production #10 parties to submit proposed order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, To Compel Production Of Documents, And For An Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Charles J. Wisch, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Hideko Shiroyama
Douglas Melton, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Foley & Lardner LLP

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted with modification. Plaintiff Hideko Shiroyama's motion to compel further responses to interrogatories and to compel production of documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is moot as to interrogatory #11. As to interrogatories 1, 4, 7, 10, defendant is ordered to respond fully as to any former employees. Any current employees may be contacted through counsel for defendant. The motion is denied as to request for production #3. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
MODIFICATION: that Request For Production #4 is moot. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
